prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CAMPUTENS-AMZ-HPN Product Type: FLATWARE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Multi-function Pocket Knife Fork Spoon Dinner Camping Utensil Set Description: Don't be the guy using pine needle chop sticks. An often overlooked essential camping accessories, eating utensils can come in handy and are easily forgotten around the camp stove.

The ASR Outdoor Pack Light Camping Flatware Utensil Set is exactly what the camping gear needed on all future outdoor camping or backpacking adventure It is a pain to carry around loose utensils in your hiking backpack, but this multi-tool solves all of your outdoor grubbing' needs, by condensing all your utensils into one multi-tool. Fork, Knife, Spoon and even a bottle opener.

The unique design features all of your basic utensils for a meal in a compact and durable tool. The body of the unit holds a traditional pocket knife blade, a larger blade, and a cork screw; for that bottle of two buck chuck you packed in. The spoon and fork retract from the body and lock in place for easy plate to mouth action. Search Terms: camping fork camp fire cooking utensil flatware boyscout gift for son boy survival camping gifts for him Features: - COMPACT DESIGN: Overall length, just 5 inches; easily stash in pocket, bag, backpack or camping gear for on the go eating - 7 IN 1 MULTITOOL: Functions as a camping knife, spoon, fork, corkscrew and knife Bottle opener combo - RETRACTABLE UTENSILS: Spoon and fork camping utensils retract from body and lock in place for ease of use and storage - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made of high-quality plastic body and stainless steel blades; this is a reliable tool rain or shine - BELT LOOP SHEATH: Included nylon carry case with belt loop; attach tool to belt for quick, easy access === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
